response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: AspiringArchitectureStudent(max)
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: Exists x (AspiringArchitectureStudent(x) & PlansToApplyTo(x, yaleSchoolOfArchitecture))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: AspiringArchitectureStudent(max) & PlansToApplyTo(max, yaleSchoolOfArchitecture) & PlansToApplyTo(max, anotherSchool)
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: PlansToApplyTo(yaleSchoolOfArchitecture, max)
